label: three_stage/ChatApp/trial_02/repeat_00
governance_notes: Parent global_vars conservation verified: messages (read_write) covered by SendMessage (write) and GetHistory (read); users (read) covered by SendMessage (write) — note: parent requires read but only write is assigned because users is only written in SendMessage; however, parent's required op is read, so this is a gap.
